description_long: This is a classic outdoor bench featuring a sturdy wooden seat and backrest, supported by robust black metal legs and armrests. The seat and backrest are composed of horizontal wooden slats with a natural, weathered finish, providing both comfort and durability. The armrests and legs are made from a single piece of curved metal on each side, giving the bench a modern yet timeless look. The bench is designed to comfortably seat two to three people and is suitable for placement in parks, sidewalks, or public gardens. The materials and construction suggest it is built to withstand outdoor conditions. The overall design balances functionality with aesthetic appeal, making it a practical amenity for urban environments.
description: A wooden slat bench with black metal curved legs and armrests, designed for outdoor use. It seats two to three people and features a classic, durable construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden slats and both black metal armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metal leg and armrest, as well as the thickness of the wooden slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest slats and the symmetrical design of the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the curved metal support and armrest structure.
